title: Drymoglossum wiesbaurii
taxonomy: Drymoglossum wiesbaurii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Drymoglossum, which is a group of tropical ferns. This species is native to tropical regions and is known for its unique characteristics. Drymoglossum wiesbaurii is often classified as a terrestrial fern, growing in a variety of environments. Further classification of this species includes its order (Polypodiales) and class (Polypodiopsida).
